NKJV.1: Oh, sing to the LORD a new song! Sing to the LORD, all the earth.
NKJV.2: Sing to the LORD, bless His name; Proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day.
NKJV.3: Declare His glory among the nations, His wonders among all peoples.
NKJV.4: For the LORD is great and greatly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.
NKJV.5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, But the LORD made the heavens.
NKJV.6: Honor and majesty are before Him; Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
NKJV.7: Give to the LORD, O families of the peoples, Give to the LORD glory and strength.
NKJV.8: Give to the LORD the glory due His name; Bring an offering, and come into His courts.
NKJV.9: Oh, worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness! Tremble before Him, all the earth.
NKJV.10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns; The world also is firmly established, It shall not be moved;  He shall judge the peoples righteously.”
NKJV.11: Let the heavens rejoice, and let the earth be glad;  Let the sea roar, and all its fullness;
NKJV.12: Let the field be joyful, and all that is in it. Then all the trees of the woods will rejoice before the LORD.
NKJV.13: For He is coming, for He is coming to judge the earth.  He shall judge the world with righteousness, And the peoples with His truth.

ESV.1: Oh sing to the LORD a new song; sing to the LORD, all the earth!
ESV.2: Sing to the LORD, bless his name; tell of his salvation from day to day.
ESV.3: Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous works among all the peoples!
ESV.4: For great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised; he is to be feared above all gods.
ESV.5: For all the gods of the peoples are worthless idols, but the LORD made the heavens.
ESV.6: Splendor and majesty are before him; strength and beauty are in his sanctuary.
ESV.7: Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples, ascribe to the LORD glory and strength!
ESV.8: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his name; bring an offering, and come into his courts!
ESV.9: Worship the LORD in the splendor of holiness;  tremble before him, all the earth!
ESV.10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns! Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity.”
ESV.11: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; let the sea roar, and all that fills it;
ESV.12: let the field exult, and everything in it! Then shall all the trees of the forest sing for joy
ESV.13: before the LORD, for he comes, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness, and the peoples in his faithfulness.

NASB.1: Sing to the LORD a new song; Sing to the LORD, all the earth.
NASB.2: Sing to the LORD, bless His name; Proclaim good tidings of His salvation from day to day.
NASB.3: Tell of His glory among the nations, His wonderful deeds among all the peoples.
NASB.4: For great is the LORD and greatly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.
NASB.5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, But the LORD made the heavens.
NASB.6: Splendor and majesty are before Him, Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
NASB.7: Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples, Ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
NASB.8: Ascribe to the LORD the glory of His name; Bring an offering and come into His courts.
NASB.9: Worship the LORD in holy attire; Tremble before Him, all the earth.
NASB.10: Say among the nations, 'The LORD reigns; Indeed, the world is firmly established, it will not be moved; He will judge the peoples with equity.'
NASB.11: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; Let the sea roar, and all it contains;
NASB.12: Let the field exult, and all that is in it. Then all the trees of the forest will sing for joy
NASB.13: Before the LORD, for He is coming, For He is coming to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness And the peoples in His faithfulness.

NLT.1:
Sing a new song to the LORD!
Let the whole earth sing to the LORD!
NLT.2:
Sing to the LORD; praise his name.
Each day proclaim the good news that he saves.
NLT.3:
Publish his glorious deeds among the nations.
Tell everyone about the amazing things he does.
NLT.4:
Great is the LORD! He is most worthy of praise!
He is to be feared above all gods.
NLT.5:
The gods of other nations are mere idols,
but the LORD made the heavens!
NLT.6:
Honor and majesty surround him;
strength and beauty fill his sanctuary.
NLT.7:
O nations of the world, recognize the LORD;
recognize that the LORD is glorious and strong.
NLT.8:
Give to the LORD the glory he deserves!
Bring your offering and come into his courts.
NLT.9:
Worship the LORD in all his holy splendor.
Let all the earth tremble before him.
NLT.10:
Tell all the nations, “The LORD reigns!”
The world stands firm and cannot be shaken.
He will judge all peoples fairly.
NLT.11:
Let the heavens be glad, and the earth rejoice!
Let the sea and everything in it shout his praise!
NLT.12:
Let the fields and their crops burst out with joy!
Let the trees of the forest sing for joy
NLT.13:
before the LORD, for he is coming!
He is coming to judge the earth.
He will judge the world with justice,
and the nations with his truth.

WEB.1: Sing to Yahweh a new song! Sing to Yahweh, all the earth.
WEB.2: Sing to Yahweh! Bless his name! Proclaim his salvation from day to day!
WEB.3: Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous works among all the peoples.
WEB.4: For great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! He is to be feared above all gods.
WEB.5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, but Yahweh made the heavens.
WEB.6: Honor and majesty are before him. Strength and beauty are in his sanctuary.
WEB.7: Ascribe to Yahweh, you families of nations, ascribe to Yahweh glory and strength.
WEB.8: Ascribe to Yahweh the glory due to his name. Bring an offering, and come into his courts.
WEB.9: Worship Yahweh in holy array. Tremble before him, all the earth.
WEB.10: Say among the nations, “Yahweh reigns.” The world is also established. It can’t be moved. He will judge the peoples with equity.
WEB.11: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice. Let the sea roar, and its fullness!
WEB.12: Let the field and all that is in it exult! Then all the trees of the woods shall sing for joy
WEB.13: before Yahweh; for he comes, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness, the peoples with his truth.

AMP.1:
O sing to the LORD a new song;
Sing to the LORD, all the earth!
AMP.2:
Sing to the LORD, bless His name;
Proclaim good news of His salvation from day to day.
AMP.3:
Declare His glory among the nations,
His marvelous works and wonderful deeds among all the peoples.
AMP.4:
For great is the LORD and greatly to be praised;
He is to be feared above all gods.
AMP.5:
For all the gods of the peoples are [worthless, lifeless] idols,
But the LORD made the heavens.
AMP.6:
Splendor and majesty are before Him;
Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
AMP.7:
Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples,
Ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
AMP.8:
Ascribe to the LORD the glory of His name;
Bring an offering and come into His courts.
AMP.9:
Worship the LORD in the splendor of holiness;
Tremble [in submissive wonder] before Him, all the earth.
AMP.10:
Say among the nations, "The LORD reigns;
Indeed, the world is firmly and securely established, it shall not be moved;
He will judge and rule the people with fairness."
AMP.11:
Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice;
Let the sea roar, and all the things it contains;
AMP.12:
Let the field be exultant, and all that is in it.
Then all the trees of the forest will sing for joy
AMP.13:
Before the LORD, for He is coming,
For He is coming to judge the earth.
He will judge the world with righteousness
And the peoples in His faithfulness.

MSG.1:
Sing God a brand-new song!
Earth and everyone in it, sing!
MSG.2:
Sing to God—worship God!
Shout the news of his victory from sea to sea,
MSG.3:
Take the news of his glory to the lost,
News of his wonders to one and all!
MSG.4:
For God is great, and worth a thousand Hallelujahs.
His terrible beauty makes the gods look cheap;
MSG.5:
Pagan gods are mere tatters and rags.
God made the heavens—
MSG.6:
Royal splendor radiates from him,
A powerful beauty sets him apart.
MSG.7:
Bravo, God, Bravo!
Everyone join in the great shout: Encore!
In awe before the beauty, in awe before the might.
MSG.9:
Bow before the beauty of God,
Then to your knees—everyone worship!
MSG.10:
Get out the message—God Rules!
He put the world on a firm foundation;
He treats everyone fair and square.
MSG.11:
Let's hear it from Sky,
With Earth joining in,
And a huge round of applause from Sea.
MSG.12:
Let Wilderness turn cartwheels,
Animals, come dance,
Put every tree of the forest in the choir—
MSG.13:
An extravaganza before God as he comes,
As he comes to set everything right on earth,
Set everything right, treat everyone fair.

NIV.1:
Psalm 96
Sing to the Lord a new song;
sing to the Lord, all the earth.
NIV.2:
Sing to the Lord, praise his name;
proclaim his salvation day after day.
NIV.3:
Declare his glory among the nations,
his marvelous deeds among all peoples.
NIV.4:
For great is the Lord and most worthy of praise;
he is to be feared above all gods.
NIV.5:
For all the gods of the nations are idols,
but the Lord made the heavens.
NIV.6:
Splendor and majesty are before him;
strength and glory are in his sanctuary.
NIV.7:
Ascribe to the Lord, O families of nations,
ascribe to the Lord glory and strength.
NIV.8:
Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name;
bring an offering and come into his courts.
NIV.9:
Worship the Lord in the splendor of his holiness;
tremble before him, all the earth.
NIV.10:
Say among the nations, “The Lord reigns.”
The world is firmly established, it cannot be moved;
he will judge the peoples with equity.
NIV.11:
Let the heavens rejoice, let the earth be glad;
let the sea resound, and all that is in it;
NIV.12:
let the fields be jubilant, and everything in them.
Then all the trees of the forest will sing for joy;
NIV.13:
they will sing before the Lord, for he comes,
he comes to judge the earth.
He will judge the world in righteousness
and the peoples in his truth.

sing to the LORD, all the earth.
NRSVCE.2:
Sing to the LORD, bless his name;
tell of his salvation from day to day.
NRSVCE.3:
Declare his glory among the nations,
his marvelous works among all the peoples.
NRSVCE.4:
For great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised;
he is to be revered above all gods.
NRSVCE.5:
For all the gods of the peoples are idols,
but the LORD made the heavens.
NRSVCE.6:
Honor and majesty are before him;
strength and beauty are in his sanctuary.
NRSVCE.7:
Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples,
ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
NRSVCE.8:
Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his name;
bring an offering, and come into his courts.
NRSVCE.9:

NET.1: Sing to the LORD a new song! Sing to the LORD, all the earth!
NET.2: Sing to the LORD! Praise his name! Announce every day how he delivers!
NET.3: Tell the nations about his splendor! Tell all the nations about his amazing deeds!
NET.4: For the LORD is great and certainly worthy of praise; he is more awesome than all gods.
NET.5: For all the gods of the nations are worthless, but the LORD made the sky.
NET.6: Majestic splendor emanates from him; his sanctuary is firmly established and beautiful.
NET.7: Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the nations, ascribe to the LORD splendor and strength!
NET.8: Ascribe to the LORD the splendor he deserves! Bring an offering and enter his courts!
NET.9: Worship the LORD in holy attire! Tremble before him, all the earth!
NET.10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns! The world is established, it cannot be moved. He judges the nations fairly.”
NET.11: Let the sky rejoice, and the earth be happy! Let the sea and everything in it shout!
NET.12: Let the fields and everything in them celebrate! Then let the trees of the forest shout with joy
NET.13: before the LORD, for he comes! For he comes to judge the earth! He judges the world fairly, and the nations in accordance with his justice.
